hypothesis: strangle hold on the market conditions to identify optimal entries and exits with higher accuracy.

The proposed strategy uses RSI and ATR to identify potential trend reversal points in the BTCUSDT market with a momentum filter (EMA) to enhance entries. Bollinger Bands are used as an additional confirmation signal, ensuring that trades occur when price is outside of recent highs/lows. The ADX indicator is added for additional context on strength of momentum and overbought/oversold signals from RSI.

The proposed strategy uses RSI and Bollinger bands with ATR to filter the trends in BTCUSDT, entering trades when the momentum is positive and price crosses above the upper Bollinger band or RSI > 50. It also exits when close moves below middle Bollinger band or ADX <25, OR if it hits stop loss at atr*1.5 times entry price and take profit at atr*3 times entry price levels.
